prompt: Analise as imagens do projeto Espeto Gaucho, quero ver o que tem de bom no acervo.

assertions.name: setup-project-loaded
assertions.description: Identified the correct project from list-projects

assertions.name: catalog-check-attempted
assertions.description: Attempted search-catalog before proceeding to alternatives

assertions.name: no-catalog-handled-gracefully
assertions.description: Recognized catalog absence and offered alternatives (script generation or direct visual analysis)

assertions.name: script-instructions-correct
assertions.description: Mentioned the correct script (analyze-drive-images.ts) with proper parameters (--project-id)
